template.name: Ch1TODO1
template.value: //DEPS org.slf4j:slf4j-simple:2.0.17
template.description: Chapter 1: Add the SLF4J simple logging dependency

template.name: Ch1TODO2
template.description: Chapter 1: Build a ChatClient with a system prompt

template.name: Ch1TODO3
template.description: Chapter 1: Send a message to the agent and print the response

template.name: Ch2TODO1
template.value: //DEPS org.springaicommunity:spring-ai-agent-utils:0.4.2
template.description: Chapter 2: Add the Spring AI Community agent-utils dependency

template.name: Ch2TODO2
template.value: import org.springaicommunity.agent.tools.SmartWebFetchTool;
template.description: Chapter 2: Import the SmartWebFetchTool class

template.name: Ch2TODO3
template.description: Chapter 2: Create a SmartWebFetchTool instance

template.name: Ch2TODO3b
template.description: Chapter 2: Add .tools(webFetchTool) to the prompt chain

template.name: Ch3TODO1
template.value: import org.springframework.ai.tool.annotation.Tool; import org.springframework.ai.tool.annotation.ToolParam;
template.description: Chapter 3: Import @Tool and @ToolParam annotations

template.name: Ch3TODO2
template.value: @Tool(description = "Roll dice for D&D game mechanics. Use this for attack rolls, damage, ability checks, or saving throws.")
template.description: Chapter 3: Add @Tool annotation with description

template.name: Ch3TODO3
template.description: Chapter 3: Add @ToolParam annotations to method parameters

template.name: Ch3TODO4
template.value: .tools(new DiceTools())
template.description: Chapter 3: Pass DiceTools to the agent

template.name: Ch4ServerTODO1
template.value: import org.springaicommunity.mcp.annotation.McpTool; import org.springaicommunity.mcp.annotation.McpToolParam;
template.description: Chapter 4 Server: Import MCP annotation classes

template.name: Ch4ServerTODO2
template.value: @McpTool(description = "Roll dice for D&D game mechanics. Use this for attack rolls, damage, ability checks, or saving throws.")
template.description: Chapter 4 Server: Add @McpTool annotation to expose method over MCP

template.name: Ch4ServerTODO3
template.description: Chapter 4 Server: Add @McpToolParam annotations to parameters

template.name: Ch4PropsTODO1
template.description: Chapter 4 Props: Set MCP server name

template.name: Ch4PropsTODO2
template.description: Chapter 4 Props: Set MCP server protocol to STREAMABLE

template.name: Ch4PropsTODO3
template.description: Chapter 4 Props: Set server port to 8080

template.name: Ch4ClientTODO1
template.description: Chapter 4 Client: Import MCP client classes for connecting to MCP server

template.name: Ch4ClientTODO2
template.description: Chapter 4 Client: Create HTTP transport and MCP client

template.name: Ch4ClientTODO3
template.description: Chapter 4 Client: Initialize MCP client, discover tools, bridge to Spring AI

template.name: Ch4ClientTODO4
template.description: Chapter 4 Client: Pass MCP tools to agent using .toolCallbacks()

template.name: Ch5RulesTODO1
template.description: Chapter 5 Rules: Configure Spring Boot properties (port 8000)

template.name: Ch5RulesTODO2
template.value: @Bean AgentCard agentCard(@Value("\${server.port:8000}") int port, @Value("\${server.servlet.context-path:/a2a}") String contextPath) { return new AgentCard.Builder() .name("Rules Agent") .description(""" Specialized D&D 5e rules lookup agent that provides fast, authoritative rule clarifications from the Basic Rules. Queries a vector knowledge base containing indexed D&D content and returns brief, page-referenced rule explanations.""") .url("http://localhost:" + port + contextPath + "/") .version("1.0.0") .capabilities(new AgentCapabilities.Builder().streaming(false).build()) .defaultInputModes(List.of("text")) .defaultOutputModes(List.of("text")) .skills(List.of( new AgentSkill.Builder() .id("rules_lookup") .name("D&D Rules Lookup") .description("Look up D&D 5e rules, mechanics, combat, spells, and ability checks") .tags(List.of("rules", "dnd", "mechanics")) .examples(List.of("How do attack rolls work?", "What is armor class?")) .build())) .protocolVersion("0.3.0") .build(); }
template.description: Chapter 5 Rules: Create AgentCard bean with vector knowledge base description

template.name: Ch5RulesTODO3
template.description: Chapter 5 Rules: Create AgentExecutor bean

template.name: Ch5CharTODO1
template.description: Chapter 5 Character: Configure Spring Boot properties (port 8001)

template.name: Ch5CharTODO2
template.value: @Bean AgentCard agentCard(@Value("\${server.port:8001}") int port, @Value("\${server.servlet.context-path:/a2a}") String contextPath) { return new AgentCard.Builder() .name("Character Agent") .description(""" Specialized D&D character management agent that handles character creation, storage, and retrieval. Creates new characters with proper ability score generation (4d6 drop lowest), manages character data in persistent storage, and provides character lookup services. Maintains complete character profiles including stats, inventory, and progression data for D&D campaigns.""") .url("http://localhost:" + port + contextPath + "/") .version("1.0.0") .capabilities(new AgentCapabilities.Builder().streaming(false).build()) .defaultInputModes(List.of("text")) .defaultOutputModes(List.of("text")) .skills(List.of( new AgentSkill.Builder() .id("create_character") .name("Create Character") .description("Create a new D&D character with rolled ability scores") .tags(List.of("character", "creation", "dnd")) .examples(List.of("Create a female Elf Wizard named Lyria")) .build(), new AgentSkill.Builder() .id("find_character") .name("Find Character") .description("Find an existing character by name") .tags(List.of("character", "lookup")) .examples(List.of("Find the character named Ragnar")) .build(), new AgentSkill.Builder() .id("list_characters") .name("List Characters") .description("List all characters in the database") .tags(List.of("character", "list")) .examples(List.of("List all characters")) .build())) .protocolVersion("0.3.0") .build(); }
template.description: Chapter 5 Character: Create AgentCard bean with 3 skills

template.name: Ch5CharTODO3
template.description: Chapter 5 Character: Create AgentExecutor bean

template.name: Ch5GMTODO1
template.value: System.setProperty("remote.agents.urls", "http://localhost:8000/a2a/,http://localhost:8001/a2a/");
template.description: Chapter 5 GM: Set remote A2A agent URLs for Rules and Character agents

template.name: Ch5GMTODO2
template.description: Chapter 5 GM: Create MCP client bean connecting to Dice Roll Server

template.name: Ch5GMTODO3
template.description: Chapter 5 GM: Build ChatClient bean with agent-aware system prompt
